focus_intent: End-to-end test of the local-RKA + new-keybox path per operator directive. Caught + fixed 3 cmd-parser bugs in the launcher .bat. 13/13 tests green. Key finding: server's --device pixel6a default makes Samsung-tagged keybox serve Pixel 6a attestations cleanly; Samsung-vs-Pixel concern much smaller than originally flagged.
deliverables_this_turn: _shared-memory/plans/emu-pixel-6a-gap-audit-2026-05-24T1540Z/audit.md (§End-to-end test results + 13/13 green + big finding + issues found)

high_value_finding.what: Java RKA server's device-claim is server-side configurable independently of keybox DeviceID. --device pixel6a (default) makes Samsung-tagged keybox serve Pixel 6a attestations cleanly at the RKA protocol level.
high_value_finding.impact: Operator decision A (keep Pixel 6a north-star) is technically clean at the RKA layer. Original Samsung-vs-Pixel worry was over-stated. Residual risk: signup collectors that inspect keybox cert-chain subject-DN at AKID level might see Samsung-TEE intermediate. Cheapest test: try path A, observe whether Play Integrity validates.
high_value_finding.recommendation: Path A. Skip B (north-star pivot) unless empirical rejection.

issues_caught_and_fixed_in_launcher.cause: UTF-8 source vs cmd OEM codepage default
Write/Edit tools write LF; cmd needs CRLF for multi-line if-blocks
cmd parser treats unescaped ( inside if-block as nested block opener
issues_caught_and_fixed_in_launcher.fix: replaced () with [] in error message text
